echoAI 0.99.0

Package index

IMPACT annotations

Query and process IMPACT transcription factor binding predictions

IMPACT_query()
Query IMPACT annotations
IMPACT_get_annotations()
Download IMPACT annotations
IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations()
Gather all IMPACT annotations that overlap with your query
IMPACT_get_annotation_key()
Get IMPACT annotation key
IMPACT_get_ldscores()
Download LD scores from IMPACT publication
IMPACT_get_top_annotations()
Get the top annotation(s)
IMPACT_postprocess_annotations()
Prepare IMPACT annotations

IMPACT enrichment

Compute and visualise enrichment of IMPACT scores across SNP groups

IMPACT_compute_enrichment()
Compute enrichment of IMPACT scores
IMPACT_iterate_enrichment()
Iterate IMPACT enrichment tests

IMPACT visualisation

Plots for IMPACT scores and enrichment results

IMPACT_plot_enrichment()
Plot IMPACT score enrichment
IMPACT_plot_impact_score()
Locus plot of IMPACT scores
IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot()
IMPACT SNP group box plot
IMPACT_heatmap()
Plot ComplexHeatmap of IMPACT scores

SpliceAI

Query and visualise SpliceAI splice-site predictions

SPLICEAI_run()
Run pre-trained SpliceAI model
SPLICEAI_query_api()
Query SpliceAI Lookup API
SPLICEAI_query_tsv()
Query genome-wide SpliceAI results (TSV format)
SPLICEAI_query_tsv_iterate()
Iterate SpliceAI TSV queries across multiple loci
SPLICEAI_query_vcf()
Query genome-wide SpliceAI results (VCF format)
SPLICEAI_snp_probs()
Postprocess SpliceAI results
SPLICEAI_plot()
Plot SpliceAI predictions

Deep learning annotations

Query and visualise Basenji/DeepSEA predictions

DEEPLEARNING_query()
Iteratively collect deep learning annotations
DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr()
Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (multiple chromosomes)
DEEPLEARNING_query_one_chr()
Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (single chromosome)
DEEPLEARNING_melt()
Melt deep learning annotations into long format
DEEPLEARNING_plot()
Plot deep learning predictions

Bundled data

IMPACT_files
IMPACT files
